rationale: The citing paper is a methodological examination of cross-sectional vs. longitudinal survey validity (CMV and causal inference), while the cited paper is an industry-specific innovation-performance study in nonprofit theater using objective archival data. Given this strong topic/method mismatch and the lack of any in-text matched evidence beyond a single DOI reference entry, this looks like an incidental/background citation rather than a substantive source for the citing paper’s core claims.
